creator: horikawa@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
The enigma(1) man page expresses:
[snip]
     Hoewever, restrictions for exporting, importing or using such tools might
     exist in some countries, so those stronger programs are not being shipped
     as part of the operating system by default.
[snip]

	I think that `Hoewever' should be `However'.

How-To-Repeat: 
	% man 1 enigma
